nasb.text: The Lord has greatly blessed my master, so that he has become rich; and He has given him flocks and herds, and silver and gold, and servants and maids, and camels and donkeys.

esv.text: The Lord  has greatly blessed my master, and he has become great. He has given him flocks and herds, silver and gold, male servants and female servants, camels and donkeys.

cnv.text: 耶和華厚厚地賜福我主人，他就昌大起來；耶和華又賜給他羊群、牛群、金銀、僕婢、駱駝和驢。

ccb.text: 耶和华赐给我主人极大的福气，使他非常富有。耶和华赐给他牛群、羊群、金子、银子、男女仆婢、骆驼和驴。

csbs.text: 耶和华大大祝福我主人，使他昌大起来，又赐给他羊群、牛群、银子、金子、男仆、婢女、骆驼和驴子。
